mapper.insert: INSERT INTO research_projects (project_name, description, teacher_id, status, start_date, end_date, created_at) VALUES (#{projectName}, #{description}, #{teacherId}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT t.name FROM teachers t WHERE t.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_applications (project_id, student_id, application_letter, status, apply_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{studentId}, #{applicationLetter}, #{status}, #{applyTime})
